rule_name: Network Connection Initiated To Cloudflared Tunnels Domains

text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND Initiated='true' AND (LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%.v2.argotunnel.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%protocol-v2.argotunnel.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%trycloudflare.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%update.argotunnel.com') AQL filter query

_$.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Kamran Saifullah, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) SIGMA Title: Network Connection Initiated To Cloudflared Tunnels Domains SIGMA Description: Detects network connections to Cloudflared tunnels domains initiated by a process on the system. Attackers can abuse that feature to establish a reverse shell or persistence on a machine.   False positives: - Legitimate use of cloudflare tunnels will also trigger this.  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
_$.name: Network Connection Initiated To Cloudflared Tunnels Domains
